image_prompt: A whimsical and humorous scene where a person is trying to float upwards with several colorful balloons, but their feet are still firmly on the ground, struggling against an invisible force. The balloons are pulling them gently, but they can't quite lift off. The person has a slightly bewildered but accepting expression. The text "A gravidade sempre te puxa para baixo." is subtly integrated into the scene, perhaps written on a small, cartoonish sign held by a tiny, mischievous gravity imp, or as a shadow text on the ground. Vibrant colors, playful style, Imagen 3.
short_sentence: A gravidade sempre te puxa para baixo.
caption: Tentando voar, mas a lei é clara: a gravidade não perdoa! 😂 Quem mais sente que a vida te puxa para baixo às vezes? Pelo menos estamos com os pés no chão, né? 😉 #CoisasObvias #Gravidade #PésNoChão #LeisDaFísica #HumorDoDia #Realidade
